name: Pineapple Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 ½-ounce) Crushed Pineapple with Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugars, crushed pineapple with juice, milk, corn syrup, salt, and butter in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook to 238 degrees F., stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat and add marshmallows and vanilla. Mix together to melt the marshmallow.
4. Beat until the mixture becomes heavy and creamy.
5. Add nuts.
6. Spread in a buttered 8-inch square pan.
7. Cut into squares when cool and firm. Makes about 49 pieces.
